notes.note: Client does not like to get in touch on calls and neither on message. He is on a WhatsApp group. Whenever he has any issue, he will reach out to us. This is the client behaviour.

candidate_facts.source_quote: He is on a WhatsApp group.
candidate_facts.confidence_note: Explicitly stated as the channel where client is reachable

candidate_facts.source_quote: Client does not like to get in touch on calls and neither on message.
candidate_facts.confidence_note: Explicitly stated that client avoids calls and direct messages

candidate_facts.value: Client reaches out proactively when issues arise rather than responding to outreach
candidate_facts.source_quote: Whenever he has any issue, he will reach out to us. This is the client behaviour.

extraction_meta.extractor_summary: Celebrityz Barbershop is a client with strong communication preferences—prefers WhatsApp group interaction, avoids calls/DMs, and initiates contact only when experiencing issues.
